title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder Music Disc Pack
description: Nintendo Music Disc Series: VOLUME I
body:
This Data and Resource Pack collection adds 35 craftable music discs from Super Mario Bros. Wonder.

### TRACKLIST
All track names are sourced from the Nintendo Music app.
- Title Screen
- World Theme: Pipe-Rock Plateau
- Grassland Theme
- Bendy-Boing Wonder
- Piranha Plants on Parade
- World Theme: Petal Isles
- Coast Theme
- Stretchy=Shadow Wonder
- World Theme: Fluff-Puff Peaks
- Snowy-Mountain Theme
- Athletic Theme
- Medley-Mix Wonder
- Palace Theme
- Bowser Jr. Battle
- World Theme: Shining Falls
- Shining Falls Theme
- Shapey-Shift Wonder
- World Theme: Sunbaked Desert
- Desert Theme
- Ninji Disco
- World Theme: Fungi Mines
- Poison-Swamp Underground Theme
- A Night at Boo's Opera
- World Theme: Deep Magma Bog
- Lava Theme
- Flowy-Flight Wonder
- Flying Battleship Theme
- Doomy-Gloom Wonder
- Mecha Maker Battle
- World Theme: Petal Isles (Castle Bowser)
- Castle Bowser Theme
- Zappy-Zone Wonder
- Bowser's Wonder Rush
- Castle Bowser Battle
- Starry-Staff Wonder

DISCLAIMER: Due to this game not having an official soundtrack release outside of Nintendo Music, song length and audio quality may not 100% reflect how it appears on the app.

### CRAFTING GUIDE
A smithing table is required to obtain discs added in these packs. The recipes are displayed in the Advancements tab, which unlocks when you obtain any Music Disc and a Closed Eyeblossom. The Advancement tab shows a checklist of each song with the required *"addition"* item needed to obtain it as the Advancement icon.
